task_completion.description: Open the default sample house project in DreamPlan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NCH DreamPlan software open with a pre-existing house project (2D floor plan or 3D view) loaded.

task_completion.description: Change the flooring of a selected room to a gym-appropriate material.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent selecting a room and applying a new flooring material (such as rubber, carpet, or cork) that looks visually distinct from the original floor.

task_completion.description: Place at least one cardio machine inside the room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a cardio machine (e.g., treadmill, elliptical, or exercise bike) selected from the library and placed on the floor inside the chosen room.

task_completion.description: Place at least one strength training item inside the room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a strength training item (e.g., weight bench, dumbbells, or multi-gym) selected from the library and placed on the floor inside the same room.

task_completion.description: Export a screenshot of the final design to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the export or save image feature in DreamPlan, saving the file as 'gym_design.png' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan GUI should be visible throughout the design process, rather than using a photo editor to manipulate an image.

integrity.description: The equipment was genuinely placed within the 3D/2D environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The placed items should integrate with the software's environment (e.g., proper perspective, selectable objects) rather than looking like pasted image overlays.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to download or generate the final image.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'wget', 'curl', or python scripts being used to bypass the GUI design process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan is a home design software by NCH Software. The task requires modifying a room in the default sample house project. The agent must place at least one cardio machine (e.g., treadmill, elliptical, exercise bike) and at least one strength training item (e.g., weight bench, dumbbells, multi-gym) from the furniture library onto the floor of the room. The room's flooring must be changed to a gym-appropriate material like rubber, carpet, or cork. Finally, the design must be exported as a PNG screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gym_design.png.
